2022 marked an important year for digital rights across the European Union as the landmark Digital Services Act (DSA) came into force on 16 ... [REF:8].

In 2016, the EU agreed with Facebook, Microsoft, Twitter, and YouTube on a code of conduct countering hate speech online. [REF:4].

**Key Findings**

- 2022 marked an important year for digital rights across the European Union as the landmark Digital Services Act (DSA) came into force on 16 ... [REF:8]
- In 2016, the EU agreed with Facebook, Microsoft, Twitter, and YouTube on a code of conduct countering hate speech online. [REF:4]
